 [tool:Bash] [tool:Bash] No calendar CLI available in the sandbox, so I can't pull up the meeting details directly. But based on what you told me — **CMHK AI for US Task Force, next Tuesday (March 31), sharing SwarmAI to AWS internal non-tech audience including LTs** — here are topic suggestions:

---

## Topic Suggestions (pick one or remix)

### 1. 🐝 "Your AI Team, 24/7 — How One Engineer Built a Personal AI Command Center"
**Angle:** Personal story + demo. You built SwarmAI because existing tools don't remember, don't compound, don't coordinate. Show the "before vs after" of daily work.
**Why it lands:** LTs relate to "I need help getting more done" — not architecture diagrams.

### 2. 🧠 "AI That Remembers: From Chatbot to Colleague"
**Angle:** The core insight — today's AI tools are stateless (every conversation starts from zero). SwarmAI solves this with persistent memory, context engineering, and self-evolution. Show how it remembers decisions, learns from mistakes, and gets better over time.
**Why it lands:** Simple "aha" moment. Everyone has experienced "why do I have to re-explain everything to AI?"

### 3. 🚀 "From 0 to Production: Building with AI Agents in 2 Weeks"
**Angle:** The builder story. SwarmAI was built largely *by* AI agents — eating your own dog food. Show the AIDLC (AI-Driven Development Lifecycle) in action: how AI doesn't just write code, it designs, reviews, tests, and ships.
